content: A coyote can run at speeds up to 64 km/h (40 mph) in short bursts when chasing prey or escaping danger. Their typical cruising speed is around 40-48 km/h (25-30 mph).
raw_content: A coyote can run at speeds up to 64 km/h (40 mph) in short bursts when chasing prey or escaping danger. Their typical cruising speed is around 40-48 km/h (25-30 mph).
